item.title: There is no more common ground
item.dc:creator: WolfWoodPress

item.title: 50 days
item.description:
Today, June 4, is the anniversary of the Tiananmen Square massacre. We often see pictures of 'Tank Man' today, but rarely do we see pictures of the protest that came before. In this post are 30 pictures from the protest.
Protesters called for greater accountability, jury trials, democracy, and freedom of speech and the press. At the height of the protests, about one million people assembled in the Square.
Here a group of soldiers cross the line and join the protesters.
The 'Goddess of Democracy and Freedom' was built by students of the Central Academy of Fine Arts and set up in the Square on May 30th.
It became a symbol that reinvigorated the protests. While there had been just 10,000 people in the square on the 29th, with its unveiling as many as 300,000 spectators flocked to the square on 30–31. It was destroyed by the government on June 4th.
item.dc:creator: TheLambtonWorm

item.title: Don’t let the sun go down on meme - pt9
item.description:
Not my doggo
After two years, we are supernovas. We are invincib—ah crap people are doing stuff again.
Dog tax! (Old photo. We’ve been engaged for over a year now because event planning is hard.)

item.title: Go Ukraine Go!
item.description: The trap Ukrainians set up yesterday bears fruit. The empty city that russians "liberated" is a death trap. Today was biggest loss for russian troops.
item.dc:creator: Luvlyquants

item.title: [Pixie and Brutus] Launch the Gnome
item.description:
No Pixie & Brutus in this one, just their friends Lola the Labrador and the St. Bernard Hugo playing a game.
Let's see if you can find it again....
Awww, Hugo always looks so scared. He needs more hugs!
I posted another Pixie & Brutus comic a few minutes ago, so check it out if you missed it: https://imgur.com/gallery/ihlaXEk
Source: https://www.webtoons.com/en/challenge/pixie-and-brutus/launch/viewer?title_no=452175&episode_no=111
Well Lula, you did say "miss by a mile"...
item.dc:creator: RuneClaw

item.title: Wouldn't that be a Dragula?

item.title: 911 Operator FIRED
item.description: This dispatcher fired for mishandling a 911 call during the Buffalo mass shooting. According to the caller, Ayers demanded to know why she was whispering, yelled at her, and hung up on her. (CNN) – A 911 dispatcher has been fired after being accused of mishandling a call during the recent mass shooting at a grocery store in Buffalo, New York. Latisha Rogers, an assistant office manager at the Tops supermarket where a gunman opened fire last month, said she dropped to the ground after hearing the shots and called 911, whispering out of fear the shooter might hear her. Officials say they teach 911 dispatchers that if someone is whispering, it probably means they’re in trouble, but Rogers said the Buffalo dispatcher responded: “I can’t hear you. Why are you whispering? You don’t have to whisper. They can’t hear you.” Shortly after that, Rogers said the dispatcher hung up the phone.
item.dc:creator: Copperbrat

item.title: And I'll need to pretend I'm happy with the proceeds
item.description: Needed to vent, will delete soon Holding off on deleting for the moment, the dopamine from all the comments is overpowering the sadness from the yard sard MV edit: lol, it seems lots of you have experience with yard sards. Thanks for sharing. Now one of my kids wants me to take them to someone else's yard sard... UPDATE: So more than half of the stuff has been sold, so one hand, nice that junk won't be in our house any more. So a little less sard now, and the comments here have been cracking me up. FINAL UPDATE (Saturday night): I'm feeling better about the Yard Sard. It went OK and even though there are things we wasted money on, maybe it wasn't as bad as I thought. Have been in a funk lately, so your response to this silly post brightened my day. I think I'll leave it up now. May all your Yard Sards be breet and cheery from now on.
item.dc:creator: lostinamapfactory

item.title: I know y'all hate this game
item.description: I know this will die in usersub but....I'm 51, started playing Fortnite so me and my boy had something to connect over (he's 15). This happened tonight! I get top 10 constantly, top 5 occasionally... Now BAM....kick ass... F**k the haters Edit - the account is my boys, it's a good 2yrs old, he's had dozens of wins, so no, it's not 'easy mode', and because it's my boys I can't share the username or join an old man crew, sorry... Woo-hoo, fp, send bewbs, but only 30yr plus bewbs, I like'm older
item.dc:creator: IamAlbertPotato

item.title: More of these studies, please
item.description: We need to continue to research and find alternative therapies with the current global mental health crisis.
